page.title: Template:Country data Kingdom of Great Britain

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Kingdom of Great Britain]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Kingdom of Great Britain]]</includeonly>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Great Britain | shortname alias = Great Britain | flag alias = Union flag 1606 (Kings Colors).svg | flag alias-1794 = Command flag of Lord Howe (1794).gif | flag alias-blue = British-Blue-Ensign-1707.svg | flag alias-white = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-white = Royal Navy | flag alias-civil = British-Red-Ensign-1707.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-naval = Royal Navy | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | link alias-army = British Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1794 | var2 = blue | var3 = white | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Great Britain | related3 = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | related4 = British Empire | cat = Great Britain, Kingdom </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Great_Britain here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Great_Britain for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = Kingdom of Great Britain | shortname alias = Great Britain | flag alias = Union flag 1606 (Kings Colors).svg | flag alias-1794 = Command flag of Lord Howe (1794).gif | flag alias-blue = British-Blue-Ensign-1707.svg | flag alias-white = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-white = Royal Navy | flag alias-civil = British-Red-Ensign-1707.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-naval = Royal Navy | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Great Britain (1707-1800).svg | link alias-navy = Royal Navy | link alias-army = British Army | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1794 | var2 = blue | var3 = white | related1 = United Kingdom | related2 = Great Britain | related3 = United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland | related4 = British Empire | cat = Great Britain, Kingdom </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
